summary: Today button navigates to today's date
description:
GIVEN a user is on the Games page
AND the displayed date/day of games is not today

steps.action: WHEN a user selects the [Today] button
steps.result:
THEN the [Today] button is dismissed
AND the date in the upper left of the screen updates to "Today, [todays date]"
AND the games for today's date are displayed
